utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution contains all six of these items. Each item is fully specified: (1) 'property' includes type, location, price, currency, and detailed attributes; (2) 'financing' includes method, down payment, interest rate, term, approval timeline, and required documents; (3) 'legal_services' includes costs and breakdown; (4) 'moving_services' includes cost, currency, service level, and included services; (5) 'setup_services' includes utility setup cost, currency, and list of included services; (6) 'total_budget' includes cost breakdown and total. All are present and fully detailed.
